name: resolvex-fullstack
description: ResolveX - Full Stack Complaint Management System

scripts.build: cd client && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && node scripts/copy-dist.js
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd BACKEND && npm run dev" "cd client && npm run dev" --names "backend,frontend" --prefix-colors "blue,green"
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../BACKEND && npm install
scripts.postinstall: cd client && npm install && cd ../BACKEND && npm install
